mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO daily_quote (ts_code, trade_date, open, high, low, close, pre_close, change_amt, pct_chg, vol, amount) VALUES
(#{item.tsCode}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.open}, #{item.high}, #{item.low}, #{item.close}, #{item.preClose}, #{item.changeAmt}, #{item.pctChg}, #{item.vol}, #{item.amount})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM daily_quote WHERE (ts_code, trade_date) IN
(#{item.tsCode}, #{item.tradeDate})
mapper.select: SELECT trade_date, COUNT(DISTINCT ts_code) AS cnt FROM daily_quote WHERE trade_date >= #{startDate} AND trade_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY trade_date

SELECT sb.symbol AS code, sb.name, dq.close, dq.pct_chg, db.turnover_rate AS turnover_rate, dq.amount FROM daily_quote dq JOIN daily_basic db ON dq.ts_code = db.ts_code AND dq.trade_date = db.trade_date JOIN stock_basic sb ON dq.ts_code = sb.ts_code WHERE dq.trade_date = #{tradeDate} AND sb.list_status = 'L' ORDER BY db.turnover_rate DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM daily_quote dq JOIN stock_basic sb ON dq.ts_code = sb.ts_code WHERE dq.trade_date = #{tradeDate} AND sb.list_status = 'L' AND dq.pct_chg > 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM daily_quote dq JOIN stock_basic sb ON dq.ts_code = sb.ts_code WHERE dq.trade_date = #{tradeDate} AND sb.list_status = 'L' AND dq.pct_chg < 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM daily_quote dq JOIN stock_basic sb ON dq.ts_code = sb.ts_code WHERE dq.trade_date = #{tradeDate} AND sb.list_status = 'L' AND dq.pct_chg = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM daily_quote dq JOIN stock_basic sb ON dq.ts_code = sb.ts_code WHERE dq.trade_date = #{tradeDate} AND sb.list_status = 'L' AND ( (sb.market = '主板' AND sb.name NOT LIKE 'ST%' AND dq.pct_chg >= 9.9) OR (sb.market = '北交所' AND sb.name NOT LIKE 'ST%' AND dq.pct_chg >= 29.9) OR (sb.market IN ('创业板','科创板') AND sb.name NOT LIKE 'ST%' AND dq.pct_chg >= 19.9) OR (sb.name LIKE 'ST%' AND dq.pct_chg >= 4.9) )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM daily_quote dq JOIN stock_basic sb ON dq.ts_code = sb.ts_code WHERE dq.trade_date = #{tradeDate} AND sb.list_status = 'L' AND ( (sb.market = '主板' AND sb.name NOT LIKE 'ST%' AND dq.pct_chg <= -9.9) OR (sb.market = '北交所' AND sb.name NOT LIKE 'ST%' AND dq.pct_chg <= -29.9) OR (sb.market IN ('创业板','科创板') AND sb.name NOT LIKE 'ST%' AND dq.pct_chg <= -19.9) OR (sb.name LIKE 'ST%' AND dq.pct_chg <= -4.9) )

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN dq.pct_chg > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_count, SUM(CASE WHEN dq.pct_chg < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_count, SUM(CASE WHEN dq.pct_chg = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS flat_count, SUM(CASE WHEN (sb.market = '主板' AND sb.name NOT LIKE 'ST%' AND dq.pct_chg >= 9.9) OR (sb.market = '北交所' AND sb.name NOT LIKE 'ST%' AND dq.pct_chg >= 29.9) OR (sb.market IN ('创业板','科创板') AND sb.name NOT LIKE 'ST%' AND dq.pct_chg >= 19.9) OR (sb.name LIKE 'ST%' AND dq.pct_chg >= 4.9) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS limit_up_count, SUM(CASE WHEN (sb.market = '主板' AND sb.name NOT LIKE 'ST%' AND dq.pct_chg <= -9.9) OR (sb.market = '北交所' AND sb.name NOT LIKE 'ST%' AND dq.pct_chg <= -29.9) OR (sb.market IN ('创业板','科创板') AND sb.name NOT LIKE 'ST%' AND dq.pct_chg <= -19.9) OR (sb.name LIKE 'ST%' AND dq.pct_chg <= -4.9) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS limit_down_count FROM daily_quote dq JOIN stock_basic sb ON dq.ts_code = sb.ts_code WHERE dq.trade_date = #{tradeDate} AND sb.list_status = 'L'
SELECT DISTINCT trade_date FROM daily_quote ORDER BY trade_date ASC

SELECT dq.ts_code AS ts_code, sb.name AS name, dq.close AS close, dq.pct_chg AS pct_chg, (dq.close - dq.pre_close) AS change_value, dq.vol AS vol, dq.amount AS amount, db.total_mv AS total_mv, db.pe_ttm AS pe_ttm, db.pb AS pb, db.turnover_rate AS turnover_rate, db.volume_ratio AS volume_ratio, si.index_name AS industry_name, (dq.high - dq.low) / NULLIF(dq.pre_close, 0) * 100 AS amplitude
ORDER BY ${sortClause} LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sw_industry_member m INNER JOIN stock_basic b ON m.ts_code = b.ts_code WHERE m.index_code = #{indexCode} AND m.is_new = '1'
AND (b.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.ts_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
